response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics perfectly match the lyrics of 'Umyau-nya Happy Life' and the subsequent speech from Mizumina Mizu. 2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed the spoken song lyrics and the talk show parts manually as reference lyrics only covered key phrases. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed each vocal line precisely to the millisecond to match her energetic, fast-paced performance and conversational style, maintaining seamless transitions.

subtitles.original: はーい！
subtitles.english: Hi!

subtitles.original: おー、いい天気！
subtitles.english: Wow, nice weather!

subtitles.original: あの雲ソフトクリームみたい！
subtitles.english: That cloud looks like soft-serve ice cream!

subtitles.original: あ、あっちわ！わたがし！
subtitles.english: Ah, over there is cotton candy!

subtitles.original: 雲ってふわふわで美味しそう...
subtitles.english: Clouds look fluffy and delicious...

subtitles.original: 人生で1回は食べてみたいよね～
subtitles.english: I want to eat them at least once in my life~

subtitles.original: うじゃじゃない！！
subtitles.english: No, wait, that's not it!!

subtitles.original: しんどいしんどいまじしんどいわ
subtitles.english: It's tough, it's tough, it's seriously tough

subtitles.original: 現実逃避なんどもしちゃうわ
subtitles.english: I escape reality over and over again

subtitles.original: 妄想 空想 頭が暴走
subtitles.english: Delusions, fantasies, my head is running wild

subtitles.original: カツオ食べたーい！！
subtitles.english: I want to eat bonito!!

subtitles.original: だらだらだらだら 怠惰全開
subtitles.english: Lazing around, full on lazy

subtitles.original: ネガティブ思考もご愛嬌です！
subtitles.english: Even negative thoughts are charming!

subtitles.original: 世界ってぽいのぽいのぽいで
subtitles.english: The world is just toss, toss, toss

subtitles.original: えいやっ えいやっ とりゃっ とりゃっ ねじ伏せちゃうぞ☆
subtitles.english: Eiya, eiya, torya, torya, I'll twist it down!☆

subtitles.original: うみゃ うみゃ うみゃ うみゃ お腹空いたら
subtitles.english: Umyau, umyau, umyau, umyau, when I'm hungry

subtitles.original: 突撃 隣の晩御飯決（ちょーやばい！）
subtitles.english: Invading my neighbor's dinner

subtitles.original: ぱくぱく うみゃうみゃ しあわせタイム
subtitles.english: Munch munch, umyau umyau, happiness time

subtitles.original: お、食欲で生きてます
subtitles.english: Oh, I live by my appetite

subtitles.original: だからどうかお願い
subtitles.english: So please, I beg of you

subtitles.original: このお腹を満たして神様！
subtitles.english: Fill this stomach, oh dear God!

subtitles.original: たべたい！
subtitles.english: I want to eat!

subtitles.original: ねてたい！
subtitles.english: I want to sleep!

subtitles.original: 難しいことは何も考えたくない
subtitles.english: I don't want to think about anything difficult

subtitles.original: あとあと、みんなでお菓子パーティーもしよー！！
subtitles.english: And also, let's have a sweets party together with everyone!!

subtitles.original: うみゃ うみゃ うみゃ うみゃ おいしくなぁれ
subtitles.english: Umyau, umyau, umyau, umyau, become delicious

subtitles.original: あれもこれでも全部食べたいな
subtitles.english: I want to eat this and that, all of it

subtitles.original: ぱくぱく うみゃうみゃ ハピネスライフ
subtitles.english: Munch munch, umyau umyau, happy life

subtitles.original: 食べて寝て遊んでまた食べて
subtitles.english: Eat, sleep, play, and eat again

subtitles.original: ペコペコペコペコ 腹ペコだぁ
subtitles.english: Peko peko peko peko, I'm starving

subtitles.original: うみゃ うみゃ うみゃ うみゃ おかわりください
subtitles.english: Umyau, umyau, umyau, umyau, seconds, please

subtitles.original: ひとまずご飯をお腹いっぱい
subtitles.english: For now, fill my stomach with food

subtitles.original: 食べさせて！
subtitles.english: Let me eat!

subtitles.original: まだ足りない もっともっと
subtitles.english: I haven't had enough yet, more, more

subtitles.original: 食べさせてーー！
subtitles.english: Let me eat more!

subtitles.original: 新曲どうだったー？
subtitles.english: How was the new song?
